span.style: font-family: "Comic Sans MS"; text-align: start; caret-color: rgb(0, 0, 0);
span.font: The stock market traded in a choppy consolidation today, opening slightly higher before gains faded as rising bull–bear divergence kept indices hovering around the previous close. Profit-taking emerged in some previously strong sectors, signaling increased short-term caution.
